name: Sung Jinah
title: The Indomitable Girl

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

passive.name: Wind
passive.description: Using Reverse Tempest Cleave, Converging Wind, Torrent, or their Umbrella variants activates the [Wind] effect (Reverse Tempest Cleave, Converging Wind, related skills, and Stormwind Serenade damage +50%; at 3 stacks grants maximum [Gale Wings] instances to entire team except Jinah; removed on tag-out; in Team Fight mode removed every 15s; 60s, stacks up to 3). [Gale Wings]: using Basic or Ultimate Skill removes 1 instance and activates [Wings of Freedom] (+10% Basic and Ultimate Skill damage, 5s, stacks up to 1).

advancements: When [Gale Wings] activates the entire team recovers 100 MP for each instance applied. [Wings of Freedom] enhanced: Basic and Ultimate Skill damage +20%, Wind damage +10%, duration 10s.
[Wings of Freedom] enhanced: Basic or Ultimate Skill damage +20%, Wind damage +10%, when Ultimate Skill hits activates Unrecoverable on target. Duration 10s.

When the [Wind] effect is activated it grants [Wind's Touch] to the entire team (+1% ATK, +1% DEF, +0.5% Basic Skill damage per stack, infinite, stacks up to 10; additionally +1% ATK, +1% DEF, +0.5% Basic Skill damage for Wind team members).
For every Wind ally, Wind team members' Wind damage increases by 5%.

Using Aero Disruption or Serenade: Aero Disruption grants 1 instance of [Aero] to the entire team. After using Stormwind Serenade in Team Fight mode, Serenade: Aero Disruption can be used again (deals 300% of Stormwind Serenade, reduces its cooldown by 60%, reactivates Sudden Showers on Jinah). When Jinah or a team member tags out, the tag-out grants 1 instance of [Aero] to the entire team.
